title: Facebook and Instagram stumble for users in Sunday-morning outage
summary: Meta says more than 3 billion people use at least one of its apps every day, with Facebook alone counting roughly 3 billion monthly users and Instagram some 2 billion, so even a partial and short-lived stumble ripples across a meaningful slice…
